problem id: 6201374a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4)

examples:
  10001000 -> 10000000
  01011101 -> 11010000
  01000010 -> 00100000
  01110110 -> 01100000
  01100010 -> 00100000
  10001100 -> 11000000
  10001010 -> 10100000
  01111000 -> 10000000

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 10100000
